eas_text: A civil authority has issued AN IMMEDIATE EVACUATION NOTICE for the following counties or areas: Lake, CA; at 7:24 PM on JUL 16, 2026 Effective until 11:24 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: Lake County Sheriff issued an EVACUATION ORDER at 07:24 PM on 07-16-2026 in the area of Riviera Heights Dr for zones KEL-E117 due to WILDFIRE. LEAVE NOW. Visit Response at Ready.LakeCountyCA.gov for more details as available or call 211. Additional evacuation instructions or information: Proceed southeast towards Konocti Harbor
